results.title: TaskFlow
results.description: TaskFlow is a Python library that helps to make task execution easy, consistent, and reliable, designed for OpenStack integration but generally usable in any project.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is a platform to programmatically author, schedule, and monitor workflows, allowing users to define workflows as Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) of tasks.

results.title: Azkaban
results.description: Azkaban is a workflow management system that helps users build and manage complex data pipelines.

results.title: iFlow CLI
results.description: iFlow CLI is a powerful AI assistant that runs in your terminal, analyzing code, executing tasks, and automating workflows with natural language interaction and free AI models.

results.title: Psyflow
results.description: Generic functions and utilites for psychopy tasks

results.title: Tasks API - Unified Workflow & Task Management Service
results.description: The Tasks API is a comprehensive multi-tenant SaaS platform for unified workflow orchestration, dynamic task management, and data integration, featuring templating, file attachments, real-time events, and multi-language support.

results.title: ControlFlow
results.description: ControlFlow is a Python framework for building agentic AI workflows, enabling structured task delegation to LLMs with control and transparency.

results.title: Conductor Tasks
results.description: A task management system designed for AI development

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is an open-source platform for programmatically authoring, scheduling, and monitoring batch-oriented workflows using Python code, featuring an extensible framework and a web interface for management.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is an open-source platform for developing, scheduling, and monitoring batch-oriented workflows using Python code with a web-based UI for visualization and management.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is an open-source platform for programmatically authoring, scheduling, and monitoring batch-oriented workflows using Python, providing an extensible framework and a web-based UI for visualization and management.

results.title: pytask
results.description: pytask is a workflow management system that facilitates reproducible data analyses with features like automatic task discovery, lazy evaluation, and extensibility through plugins.

results.title: Obsidian Tasks
results.description: Task management for the Obsidian knowledge base, allowing users to track, query, and manage tasks across their vault with support for due dates, recurring tasks, and filtering.

results.title: Taskflow
results.description: A General-purpose Task-parallel Programming System using Modern C++

results.title: MarkdownFlow
results.description: MarkdownFlow extends Markdown with AI to create personalized, interactive pages by transforming prompts into content that adapts to user choices, preferences, and context.

results.title: Rocketlane Task API
results.description: The Rocketlane Task API provides developers with a powerful toolkit to integrate task management functionality, enabling teams to organize, track, and collaborate on tasks within their applications.

results.title: Roboflow
results.description: Roboflow is a computer vision platform for building, training, and deploying machine learning models with dataset management, annotation, and deployment capabilities.

results.title: Workflows Python
results.description: Workflows are an event-driven, async-first, step-based way to control the execution flow of AI applications like agents.

results.title: Multi-AI-Agent Systems with crewAI
results.description: This project automates business workflows using autonomous AI agents organized into teams with specific roles and tools, leveraging the crewAI framework for efficient task execution.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is an open-source platform for programmatically authoring, scheduling, and monitoring batch-oriented workflows using Python, providing an extensible framework and a web-based UI for visualization and management.

results.title: Apache Airflow
results.description: Apache Airflow is a platform to programmatically author, schedule, and monitor workflows.

results.title: ArkFlow
results.description: ArkFlow is a high-performance Rust stream processing engine that seamlessly integrates AI capabilities, providing powerful real-time data processing and intelligent analysis with support for multiple input/output sources, processors, and machine learning model execution.

results.title: Cloudflare Workflows
results.description: Cloudflare Workflows is a durable execution engine built on Cloudflare Workers, enabling the creation of multi-step applications that can automatically retry, persist state, and run for extended periods. It simplifies building reliable, long-running tasks and observing their progress.

results.title: Aioclock
results.description: Aioclock is an asyncio-based scheduling framework for periodic tasks, featuring dependency injection, task grouping, and Pydantic v2 validation for efficient and flexible task management.

results.title: JAI Workflow
results.description: A Java library for building, orchestrating, and monitoring agentic AI workflows, RAG systems, and AI agents programmatically with granular control and state management.

results.title: AdalFlow
results.description: AdalFlow is a PyTorch-like library for building and auto-optimizing language model workflows, including chatbots, RAG, and agents, with features like auto-differentiative prompting and model-agnostic building blocks.

results.title: Taskmaster
results.description: An AI-powered task-management system you can drop into Cursor, Lovable, Windsurf, Roo, and others.

results.title: Re-frame Async Flow Fx
results.description: A re-frame library for coordinating asynchronous, stateful tasks with dependencies, enabling graceful handling of failures during application startup.

results.title: Cloudflare Workflows (llmstxt)
results.description: Cloudflare Workflows is a durable execution engine built on Cloudflare Workers, enabling the creation of multi-step applications that can automatically retry, persist state, and run for extended periods, simplifying the development of reliable, long-running tasks.

results.title: Digdag
results.description: Digdag is an open-source workflow engine designed for automating, orchestrating, and scheduling data pipelines and other tasks.
